hero.subtitle: At Lizza X, we design and develop high-performance, scalable digital products. Specialized in native and hybrid mobile applications, Artificial Intelligence integrations, and cloud architectures.

about.title: The Engine Behind Lizza X
about.subtitle: A single point of contact for global engineering-level execution.
about.bio_p1: Hi, I'm Gustavo. I founded Lizza X with a clear vision: to raise the standard of software development by combining engineering rigor with the speed of Artificial Intelligence and user-centered design.
about.bio_p2: With years of experience in mobile development (native Android with Kotlin, native iOS with Swift, and cross-platform with Flutter/KMP) and cloud systems, I act as the lead architect and developer for your projects. This guarantees zero communication gap in the process and that every line of code complies with the highest quality standards and SOLID principles.

experience.title: My Path & Expertise
experience.subtitle: Learn about my academic, professional, and technical specialization history.

jobs.desc: Architechting and coding mobile solutions (Kotlin Multiplatform, Flutter) and integrating AI workflows for startups and international businesses across Wyoming and Latin America.
Training thousands of developers on modern mobile technologies (Android, Jetpack Compose, Kotlin, Swift) and clean architecture best practices.
Technical lead creating highly transactional mobile apps, migrating legacy codebases to Kotlin, and implementing MVVM and Clean Architecture patterns.
